message:
fix(types): resolve TypeScript strictness issues in test files and clients

- Fix TS4111: use bracket notation for index signature property access
  (Record<string, unknown> properties like metadata.summary, details.issues)
- Fix TS2379: avoid assigning undefined to optional properties
  (exactOptionalPropertyTypes) by conditionally adding properties
- Fix TS2532: add non-null assertions for array element access
- Fix TS2769: add fallback values for potentially undefined parameters
- Rename createBunCommandRunner to createBun{Apr,Caam,Cass}CommandRunner
  for clarity and to avoid naming conflicts

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
